column1: # sklib benchmark genome catalogue — the single source of truth for fetchable genomes.
# Read by benchmark/scripts/genomes.sh (shared by lib.sh, large_scale_e2e.sh,
# fetch_genomes.sh). Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Columns are whitespace-separated; the description is the trailing free-text field
#   name    short id used in DATASETS= / GENOMES= and on the fetch_genomes.sh CLI
#   kind    url = a direct .fa.gz URL (curl + gunzip)
#           ncbi = an NCBI nuccore accession, fetched as FASTA via E-utilities efetch (no toolkit)
#   source  the URL (kind=url) or the accession (kind=ena)
# Update a reference  -> edit its row.
ecoli       ncbi  NC_000913.3                                                              4.6Mb   E. coli K-12 MG1655
